settings.title: Define the model
settings.text: Clarify the target market, service offer, delivery model, revenue logic, required assets, and launch sequence.

settings.title: Create the operating kit
settings.text: Develop the practical pieces: documents, workflows, pages, tools, pricing, onboarding materials, and early customer pathways.

settings.title: Move to market
settings.text: Use a staged plan to validate demand, refine the offer, capture leads, and decide the next build priorities.

settings.heading: Custom business build support
settings.text: For buyers who want a more tailored pathway than a template or starter kit, Remote Business Partner can help shape, package, and build a business concept.
